name: product-hunt-launch
description: Product Hunt launch optimization with specific specs, timing, and gallery strategy. Covers taglines, gallery images, maker comments, and launch day tactics. Use for: product launches, startup launches, side project launches, Product Hunt optimization. Triggers: product hunt, ph launch, product hunt launch, launch strategy, product launch, startup launch, product hunt tips, product hunt gallery, ph optimization, launch day, product hunt maker
capabilities: Provides listing specifications (tagline 60 chars, description 260 chars, gallery 8 images)
Recommends gallery image dimensions and content strategy for each position
Offers proven tagline formulas with examples
Suggests optimal launch timing (Tuesday-Thursday at 12:01 AM PT)
Includes maker comment template and structure
Provides complete launch day timeline with engagement rules
author: inference-sh-9
securitySummary: This is a legitimate Product Hunt launch guide skill. The static scanner flagged numerous patterns that are false positives: code fences were misidentified as shell backticks, hardcoded URLs are informational references to the inference.sh CLI (not data exfiltration), and cryptographic algorithm alerts were triggered by documentation text about SHA-256 checksums. The only true positive is the 'curl | sh' installation pattern on line 14, which is a standard CLI installation method with a hardcoded, trusted URL. No malicious intent detected.
valueStatement: This skill provides comprehensive guidance for launching on Product Hunt, covering listing specifications, gallery image generation, tagline optimization, timing strategies, and a complete launch day playbook to maximize your chances of success.
userTitle: Launch Your Product on Product Hunt
limitations: Does not actually post to Product Hunt - only provides guidance
Does not generate images directly - references external inference.sh CLI
Does not guarantee product visibility or success
Content is based on general best practices, not insider knowledge

useCases.targetUser: Startup founders, indie hackers launching their first product
useCases.title: First-time Product Hunt launch
useCases.description: A founder preparing for their first Product Hunt launch who needs to understand listing specs, image requirements, and launch timing.

useCases.targetUser: Marketing teams, solo founders with design skills
useCases.title: Gallery image guidance
useCases.description: Someone needing to create compelling gallery images who wants to understand what content works best for each position.

useCases.targetUser: Any Product Hunt maker wanting structured launch day guidance
useCases.title: Launch day playbook
useCases.description: A maker who wants a clear timeline and engagement strategy for launch day to maximize visibility and engagement.

promptTemplates.title: Get Product Hunt listing specs
promptTemplates.prompt: What are the Product Hunt listing specifications? Include tagline character limit, description length, gallery image dimensions, and topic limits.

promptTemplates.title: Create tagline formula
promptTemplates.prompt: My product is [describe your product]. Help me create 5 tagline options using the formulas from the skill: action for audience, result without pain, tool that benefit.

promptTemplates.title: Plan gallery images
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me plan my Product Hunt gallery images. My product is [describe]. What should each of the 5 recommended gallery images show?

promptTemplates.title: Draft maker comment
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me write a maker comment for my Product Hunt launch. My product does [description], I built it because [reason], and the key feature is [feature]. Structure it according to the recommended format.

bestPractices: Post your maker comment within 5 minutes of going live to establish immediate engagement
Use the recommended gallery image positions strategically - position 1 must stop the scroll and communicate what the product does
Reply to every single comment - makers who engage get more visibility
antiPatterns: Launching on Friday or weekend when traffic is lowest
Asking for upvotes directly - this violates Product Hunt terms and can get your product flagged
Using generic gallery images that do not show your actual product UI

faq.question: What is the best day to launch on Product Hunt?
faq.answer: Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday are the best days. These have the highest traffic. Avoid weekends when fewer people browse Product Hunt.

faq.question: What time should I launch?
faq.answer: Launch at 12:01 AM PT (Pacific Time). This is the start of the Product Hunt day and gives you the full 24 hours to accumulate upvotes.

faq.question: How many gallery images should I use?
faq.answer: Use up to 8 images. 5 is recommended. The first image is most important as it appears in the feed, email digest, and social shares.

faq.question: What are the tagline requirements?
faq.answer: 60 characters maximum, no period at the end. Must communicate what the product does AND why someone should care.

faq.question: When should I post my maker comment?
faq.answer: Post within 5 minutes of going live. This is your first pitch and sets the tone for engagement.

faq.question: Can I ask people to upvote my product?
faq.answer: No. Asking for upvotes directly violates Product Hunt terms of service and can get your product flagged. Share the link naturally and let the product speak for itself.
